status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: Administers the Security of Critical Infrastructure Act 2018.

data.description: Establishes obligations for owners/operators of critical infrastructure assets across 11 sectors — asset registration, mandatory cyber incident reporting, and enhanced government assistance powers.
data.notes: See also secid:regulation/homeaffairs.gov.au/cirmp-rules for the risk-management-program rules made under this Act.

match_nodes.description: Critical Infrastructure Risk Management Program Rules

data.official_name: Security of Critical Infrastructure (Critical Infrastructure Risk Management Program) Rules 2023
data.description: Made under SOCI Act s.30AH (secid:regulation/homeaffairs.gov.au/soci-act). Requires responsible entities to establish, maintain, and comply with a written risk management program addressing cyber/physical/personnel/supply-chain hazards.
